articles.author: Aisha Malik
articles.title: Apple quietly launches AirPods Max 2 - TechCrunch
articles.description: The successor to its premium headphones cost $549 and are launching with enhanced active noise cancellation, the H2 chip, live translation, better sound quality, and more.
articles.content:
In a surprise launch on Monday, Apple unveiled the AirPods Max 2, the long-awaited successor to its premium headphones that launched in 2020.
The Max 2 cost $549, and feature active noise cancellati… [+2117 chars]

articles.title: MacBook Neo Components Required A ‘Rethink’ From Apple To Get Down To That $599 Price, New Report Says A Touchscreen In Newer Models Isn’t ‘Plausible’ - Wccftech
articles.description: A touchscreen isn’t making its way to a successive MacBook Neo model, as Apple found it very difficult to bring the notebook down to that low $599 price
